title: Huawei AR280 Gbit PoE Router
description: Huawei AR280 is a high-performance all-in-one gigabit PoE router with (1) 2.5G PoE+ port , (4) Gbit PoE+ ports and a 41W PoE budget . The router supports management via a local web interface as well as cloud management ( eKit SNC / eKit mobile app ). The device's maximum power consumption is 8W (without PoE load) (1) 2.5G PoE+ LAN/WAN port , (3) Gbit PoE+ LAN/WAN ports and (1) Gbit PoE+ LAN port PoE+ 802.3af/at with a total budget of 41W Perpetual PoE - ensures uninterrupted power supply to connected PoE devices even during router restarts or upgrades Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) - automatic one-click updates Easy management via the eKit SNC / eKit mobile app Automatic loop prevention, load balancing, VLAN, QoS and IPSec VPN Device Power adapter and cable
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 4 WAN speed (3) 10/100M/1G LAN/WAN + (1) 100M/1/2.5G LAN/WAN Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000/2500Mbps LAN/WAN + (3) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN/WAN + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power type DC connector PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 5 PoE budget [W] 41 Max. power consumption [W] 49 Power via connector/terminal 56V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 930 Width [mm] 195 Height [mm] 35 Depth [mm] 130 Hardware CPU Dual Core CPU frequency [MHz] 1300 CPU cores 2 RAM [MB] 512 General IPsec VPN Throughput [Mb/s] 200
